meta.title: The Air Force wants to re-arm and re-fuel F-35s in under 30 minutes #f35
meta.description:
Integrated Combat Turns are a vital part of keeping F-35s in the air, and in the fight, but because they involve refueling and re-arming the fighter while its powerful engine continues to burn, it has to be done right — and above all else — safely. 

Stay on top of Defense News by subscribing to Sandboxx!
